violations.text: The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was cleaned and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Food observed stored on the floor in the basement. Food observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor in the basement. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

Utensils such as knives, cleavers, mandolin, etc. observed stored in a container with unclean items. Utensils observed stored on dusty wire shelves in the kitchen. Cleaned equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean dry location, where they are not subject to dust or splash, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the basement. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Wood is used in the construction of shelves in the kitchen. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the wire and wood shelves in the kitchen, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shredded delivery plastic observed on a small kitchen table. The chest freezers have accumulations of frost and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The walls in the kitchen have an accumulation of food residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

The wall trim on the corner pieces of the short wall near the prep sink in the kitchen is in poor repair, with pieces of plastic missing, and not holding down the FRP. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

The soffit on the ceiling above basement food prep area is in poor repair, with a hole exposing spun insulation. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

One wall in the basement food prep area is constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026
